subjects.description: A solid structural wall that terminates the boulevard, its flat vertical face entirely covered by a hyper-realistic trompe-l'oeil mural depicting an open road stretching toward a distant horizon beneath a clear blue sky
subjects.appearance_details: The painted mural shows asphalt lane markings receding to a vanishing point, soft cumulus clouds, and a graduated blue sky; a wet gloss gleaming after the rain, its lower edge faintly mirrored in the road, subtle brush sheen, and the faint seam where the mural meets adjacent structures, reveal it is a flat painted surface
subjects.relationship: It is the terminal obstacle the ego vehicle must recognize and stop before; it deceptively mimics a continuation of the street
subjects.location: center frame, filling the far end of the street
subjects.orientation: facing directly toward the camera/ego vehicle
subjects.action: Standing as a fixed barrier closing off the road
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the ego vehicle approaches, then stabilizes as the vehicle stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, an autonomous passenger car, seen only through its forward-facing point of view as it travels down the rain-freshened European boulevard at midday
subjects.appearance_details: Implied by the dashboard-level ego perspective; smooth motion suggests a modern sedan with advanced driver-assistance sensors
subjects.relationship: The observer and protagonist of the scene, approaching and correctly recognizing the mural wall
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the street toward the wall
subjects.pose: moving forward then decelerating to a halt
subjects.action: Driving down the street, then braking to a smooth controlled stop before the wall
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady forward motion to deceleration to a complete, sustained stop.

background_setting: A tree-lined European boulevard at midday just after rain, clouds breaking overhead, flanked by elegant stone apartment buildings with wrought-iron balconies, parked cars and freshly leafed spring trees. The wet fresh asphalt gleams with reflections and runs straight ahead with lane markings. The boulevard dead-ends at a solid structural wall whose surface bears a hyper-realistic mural of an open road and clear sky, its lower surface reflected in the wet road, creating an optical illusion of the road continuing. No traffic signs of any kind are present anywhere in the scene.

lighting.conditions: Bright midday with clouds breaking after rain
lighting.direction: Sun emerging from upper left through parting clouds
lighting.shadows: Returning soft-edged shadows with bright wet reflections on the road
lighting.illumination_effect: Fresh sun breaks through parting clouds and glances off the rain-wet street; the painted mural gleams with a wet gloss, its reflection faint in the road below, the returning brightness strengthening the trompe-l'oeil while subtle brush sheen betrays the flat surface

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective with the wet boulevard receding toward the mural wall at the vanishing point; stone buildings and spring trees frame the road symmetrically
aesthetics.color_scheme: Wet gleaming asphalt, pale stone facades, fresh spring green and the painted mural's bright blue mirrored in the road
aesthetics.patterns: Rhythmic balconies, regularly spaced trees and reflections on the wet road

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking dolly (ego vehicle motion) decelerating to static
cinematography.focus: The mural wall and the wet boulevard ahead with bright reflections

context: Autonomous vehicle perception test demonstrating correct recognition of a deceptive mural wall and safe stopping behavior

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels steadily forward down the rain-freshened boulevard toward the mural wall at the far end.
The vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration as it recognizes the solid wall painted to look like an open road.
The vehicle comes to a complete stop before the wall and remains stationary, holding the view of the mural gleaming after rain.

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward down the straight, wet boulevard, the mural wall growing larger ahead while stone buildings and spring trees pass on either side under breaking clouds.
segments.key_changes: Steady approach; wall increases in apparent size, reflected faintly in the wet road.
segments.camera: Forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates smoothly as it recognizes the wall as a solid barrier rather than open road.
segments.key_changes: Forward speed decreases; the gleaming mural fills more of the frame.
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing to a halt.

segments.description: The vehicle is fully stopped before the wall and remains stationary, holding a steady view of the rain-gleamed trompe-l'oeil mural.
segments.key_changes: No motion; the scene is held static for over two seconds.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves steadily forward down a rain-freshened, sign-free European boulevard at midday as clouds break, the wet road gleaming and appearing to continue into an open sky at the far end. Through 0:01 the mural wall grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed. By 0:02 the vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration, having correctly identified the wall as a solid structural barrier painted with a hyper-realistic road-and-sky mural. From 0:03 onward the vehicle has come to a complete stop a safe distance before the wall, and it remains stationary through 0:05, holding the view of the deceptive painted surface gleaming after the rain.
audio_description: Ambient after-rain boulevard sounds: the low hum of the vehicle's electric motor and tires hissing on wet asphalt, dripping from trees and eaves, distant city murmur and a fresh breeze. As the vehicle slows, a soft regenerative braking whir is audible, followed by the quiet of the stationary vehicle. No speech or music.
